title: AudienceStateSignal
description: Smoothed, confidence-gated audience state message published from audience-state to decision-optimizer via MQTT. ICD-3 contract. Downstream of ICD-2 (cv-observation). No images, frame URLs, face embeddings, or reversible biometric templates are permitted.

message_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this message. Used for deduplication under MQTT QoS 1.

produced_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when this smoothed state signal was emitted.

camera_id.description: Stable camera identifier, unique within a site. Must match the camera_id in the source cv-observation messages.

state.description: Smoothed and confidence-gated audience state estimate for decision use. Derived from one or more ICD-2 cv-observation messages.

presence.description: Smoothed person presence estimate for the current window.

count.description: Smoothed estimate of persons present. Not a per-identity count.

confidence.description: Confidence in the smoothed presence estimate, in range [0.0, 1.0].

stability.description: Stability indicators that govern whether the decision-optimizer should act on this state or hold the current content.

state_stable.description: True if the state estimate is stable enough for normal decision logic. False during initial warm-up or rapid change.

freeze_decision.description: True if the decision-optimizer must hold its current content selection and not switch. Driven by low confidence, rapid flux, or policy-minimum dwell not yet elapsed.

demographics_suppressed.description: True if demographic attributes were suppressed for this window due to low confidence gating. When true, the decision-optimizer must not apply demographic conditions.

observations_in_window.description: Number of ICD-2 cv-observation messages that contributed to this state estimate.

attention.description: Smoothed gaze-toward-display probability. Behavioral engagement metric — not demographic. Not subject to demographics_suppressed gate. Absent when head-pose model is not active.

demographics.description: Optional smoothed demographic distributions. Must not contain per-person identifiers. All attributes are probabilistic aggregates only. Suppressed when confidence is below gating threshold.

age_group.description: Smoothed distribution over coarse age bins. Values are probabilities summing to approximately 1.0.

gender.description: Smoothed coarse apparent-gender distribution. Values are visual-appearance-based probabilities summing to approximately 1.0. Aggregate probabilistic bins only — not identity or biometric data.

attire.description: Smoothed clothing-category distribution. Visual-appearance-based probabilities. Aggregate probabilistic bins only — not identity or biometric data. Absent when attire CV model is not active.

dwell_estimate_ms.description: Smoothed average dwell time estimate for persons present, in milliseconds.

suppressed.description: True if demographic attributes were suppressed due to low confidence gating.

source_quality.description: Rollup of upstream CV signal quality. Used by the decision-optimizer to evaluate how fresh and reliable the state estimate is.

signal_age_ms.description: Age of the most recent ICD-2 cv-observation that contributed to this state, in milliseconds. High values indicate stale input.

pipeline_degraded.description: True if the upstream input-cv pipeline was in a degraded state during the contributing observation window.

observations_dropped.description: Count of ICD-2 messages that were received but excluded from this state estimate due to quality gating.

privacy.description: Hard contract flags. All must be false. Schema-enforced privacy boundary. Mirrors ICD-2 privacy block — the smoothing layer must not add image data that cv-observation forbids.
